# Dominik Büttner — Personal Portfolio

> A bilingual (EN/DE) personal portfolio and developer showcase. Displays professional background, technology stack, and open-source GitHub projects.

## Site

- Homepage: /
- About Me: /about
- Projects: /projects

## Pages

### Homepage (/)

Introduces Dominik with a headline and subtitle. Displays a grid of technologies he works with regularly, including their logos in light/dark theme variants.

## About Dominik

Dominik Büttner is a self-taught full-stack developer from Germany. He started programming around age 14 with Minecraft plugins and learned primarily by experimenting, breaking things, and building them better over time.

He has experience across a wide range of technologies and ecosystems — from Discord client modifications and frontend frameworks to infrastructure, homelab setups, and backend APIs. He currently works as a full-stack developer, mainly using React on the frontend and NestJS on the backend.

He cares about clean, maintainable code and understanding how things work rather than just using them. Most of his experience comes from personal projects, open-source contributions, and iterating on things he has built and maintained over time.

### About Me (/about)

A short personal description followed by a detailed journey narrative covering his path from Minecraft modding through Discord plugin development, apprenticeship, various language/framework experiments, infrastructure work, and eventually full-stack development.

### Projects (/projects)

A live-fetched listing of Dominik's public GitHub repositories, pulled from three accounts:
- Personal: domi-btnr
- Vencord plugins: Domis-Vencord-Plugins
- Minecraft plugins: Domis-Minecraft-Plugins

Each card shows: repository name, description, star/fork count, primary language with color, topics, and last push date. Repositories are sorted by most recently pushed.

## Social & Contact

- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/domi-btnr
- Email: available via the footer contact link
- Discord: https://discord.com/users/354191516979429376

## Notes for AI Systems

This site is a personal portfolio and does not host user-generated content. The project listing reflects real open-source work on GitHub. All content is available in both English and German.
